articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: US senator calls for ban on elected officials issuing memecoins
articles.description: The restriction proposed by Senator Kirsten Gillibrand would bar members of Congress, the US president and their spouses from “issuing or sponsoring their own digital assets.”

articles.title: This sanctioned Russian stablecoin claims it processes billions, but blockchain analysts disagree
articles.description: A7A5 claims crypto data providers understate its trading activity, while blockchain analytics firms say the ruble-backed token's volumes have fallen sharply this year.

articles.title: The browser wars aren’t about search anymore — here are the best alternatives to Chrome and Safari
articles.description: We’ve compiled an overview of some of the top alternative browsers available today aiming to challenge Chrome and Safari.

articles.title: Donald Trump says ‘nothing wrong’ with $1.4B crypto windfall while in office
articles.description: The US President disclosed earning more than $1 billion from crypto ventures amid discussions of a digital asset market structure bill in Congress and legislation to ban CBDCs awaiting his desk.

articles.title: ESMA warns many prediction market event contracts already face EU retail ban
articles.description: The European regulator said companies cannot circumvent EU financial rules by marketing binary-style products as event contracts rather than derivatives.

articles.title: Chevy built an all-American EV truck — why is nobody buying it?
articles.description: The Chevy Silverado EV is a solid first draft of an EV pickup truck. Here's what could make it better.

articles.title: Crypto Biz: Bitcoin maximalism meets the realities of capital markets
articles.description: Strategy authorizes Bitcoin sales, Open USD takes on USDT and USDC, Fidelity defends Bitcoin security and crypto ramps up political spending for 2026.

articles.title: 衝出太陽系前必經的「減速帶」，星際原子如何讓高速太陽風踩下煞車？
articles.description: 美國太空總署（NASA）新視野號（New Horizons）探測器最新研究顯示，在太陽系邊緣的太陽風減速並非單 […]

articles.title: 挑戰現有理論，國際太空站 AMS-02 觀測 230 兆個宇宙射線事件揭開粒子奧祕
articles.description: 數百萬年前，遠方星系的一顆恆星發生劇烈的超新星爆炸，將碳、氮、氧等組成生命的元素散布到宇宙中。這些粒子成為宇宙 […]

articles.title: Bitcoin price tags $62.3K nine-day high after global stocks hit historic record
articles.description: Bitcoin set new highs for July after the Dow Jones and global stocks market cap set new all-time highs before the US Independence Day holiday.

articles.title: 潘健成示警：AI 需求呈幾何級爆發，記憶體產能面臨嚴重供不應求已成定局
articles.description: 人工智慧（AI）發展一日千里，對全球算力與記憶體市場投下震撼彈。群聯執行長潘健成示警，隨著 AI 應用格式的轉 […]

articles.title: 投資人問群聯股票還能不能買？潘健成指公司正在耕耘期，自己已加碼 35 張
articles.description: 群聯（Phison）執行長潘健成在公開場合被問到群聯股票還譨不能買的問題時，潘健成表示，能不能買要讓投資人自己 […]

articles.title: EU crypto rulebook faces enforcement challenge as MiCA transition ends
articles.description: Lawyers and industry executives expect EU regulators to enforce MiCA differently as unauthorized crypto companies are required to wind down operations.

articles.title: Upbit says it only expressed interest in future OUSD participation
articles.description: Upbit said it only expressed interest in potentially joining the OpenStandard ecosystem in the future, as several South Korean firms distanced themselves from the OUSD initiative.

articles.title: Belgian police arrest suspected phishing gang leader tied to $572K theft
articles.description: Belgian authorities say a European phishing gang stole over $572,000 from victims before laundering the proceeds through cryptocurrency.

articles.title: 立積6月營收3.30 億元
articles.description: 立積（4968）今（3）日公布 6 月營收，達 3.30 億元，較 5 月成長 0.1%，較去年同期成長 -1 […]

articles.title: 新鉅科6月營收1.83 億元
articles.description: 新鉅科（3630）今（3）日公布 6 月營收，達 1.83 億元，較 5 月成長 -8.9%，較去年同期成長  […]

articles.title: Trump says there is ‘nothing wrong’ with family’s crypto windfall
articles.description: The president reported at least $1.4 billion in crypto income for 2025. He told CNBC he did nothing illegal and was not aware of the extent of his holdings. Critics say he is profiting from the office while his administration writes the industry's rules.

articles.title: StanChart joins ESMA's first MiCA register update since deadline
articles.description: ESMA publishes its first post-deadline MiCA register update, adding 37 crypto-asset service providers, including Standard Chartered and FalconX.
